name: hireiq-monorepo
description: HireIQ Autonomous Hiring Agent — Frontend (Next.js :3000) + Backend (FastAPI :8000)

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --raw -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c green,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: cd hiring-agent && uv run uvicorn main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others --raw -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c green,cyan "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.start:backend: cd hiring-agent && uv run uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
